title: Junior Business Development Manager at Phoenix Mills

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Phoenix Mills
jsonLd.description:
Phoenix Mills, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!
